title: Wire ContourCuttingView to profiling endpoint with full robustness (20 fixes)
intent: Replace setTimeout fake with real /api/cam/profiling/intent-gcode call, adding comprehensive client-side validation, response validation, request normalization, abort support, network error handling, accessible controls, and honest gates for unsupported features.

diff_articulation.what_changed: profiling.ts: AbortController support, network error handling, response type guard, Object.setPrototypeOf for Error, any->unknown. ContourCuttingView.vue: validateRequest() preflight with polygon sanity checks, normalized buildRequest(), computed canGenerate, defensive result rendering, exposed retract_z/climb_milling, fixed blocked.issues type coercion, filename sanitization, ARIA attributes, inputmode for mobile, mode-note UX clarity.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Original PR #107 (reverted) lacked client-side validation, trusted backend responses blindly, leaked stale dependent values, had instanceof fragility, and missing accessibility. This PR addresses all 20 identified issues.

files.intent: Typed API client with AbortController, network error handling, response validation type guard, Object.setPrototypeOf for reliable instanceof, any->unknown typing.
files.behavior_change: none - new file with robustness improvements
verification: Verify AbortError handled, network errors surface clearly, invalid response shape throws

files.intent: Wire to real endpoint with validateRequest() preflight (polygon area, duplicate points, tab_height < cut_depth, finite positive values), normalized buildRequest() (zero dependent fields when feature off), computed canGenerate, defensive resultSummary, exposed retract_z/climb_milling, fixed blocked.issues coercion, sanitized filename, ARIA roles/labels, inputmode for mobile, UX mode-note.
files.behavior_change: frontend - view now validates before calling backend, handles all error states
verification: Live test: invalid inputs show inline errors, valid inputs generate toolpath, 409 shows issues, download works
